title: The Brave Little Rabbit
moral: Courage means doing something even when you are scared.
moralZh: 勇气，就是即使害怕，也要勇敢地迈出那一步。

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: Once upon a time, in a big green forest, there lived a little rabbit named Max. Max had soft white fur and the longest ears you had ever seen.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: Every night, Max was scared of the dark. He would hide under his blanket and shake like a leaf.

paragraphs.speaker: Max
paragraphs.text: "I don't want to go outside," said Max. "The forest is too dark and too scary at night."

paragraphs.speaker: Mama Rabbit
paragraphs.text: "Oh, Max," said Mama Rabbit softly. "The dark is just the sky taking a rest. There is nothing to be afraid of."

paragraphs.speaker: Max
paragraphs.text: "But what about those big shadows?" Max asked, his ears flat against his head.

paragraphs.speaker: Mama Rabbit
paragraphs.text: "Those are just the trees dancing in the wind," Mama said with a smile. "Come, I will walk with you."

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: Max took a deep breath. He held Mama's paw tightly and stepped outside. The night air was cool and fresh.

paragraphs.speaker: Max
paragraphs.text: "Wow!" Max whispered. "The stars are so beautiful! I never knew the night looked like this!"

paragraphs.speaker: Mama Rabbit
paragraphs.text: "You see?" Mama said proudly. "My brave little rabbit. You did it!"

paragraphs.speaker: Max
paragraphs.text: Max smiled the biggest smile. "I was scared," he said, "but I did it anyway. That means I have courage!"

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.text: From that night on, Max loved looking at the stars. And he was never afraid of the dark again.
